title: knautia drymeja subsp. intermedia
intro: Knautia drymeja subsp. intermedia, also known as the intermediate knawel or knawel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Knautia drymeja subsp. intermedia include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation and relieve digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
